stem: Complete the description of common networking hardware. Each gap takes one term from the bank above; each term is used at most once.
model_answer: A switch forwards frames to the device named in the destination MAC address; a router forwards packets between networks using IP addresses; a wireless access point provides Wi-Fi access to a wired LAN.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Drag or tap a bank term into each gap.

part_config.text: A {{d1}} forwards frames inside a single LAN by reading the destination MAC address. A {{d2}} forwards packets between networks by reading the destination IP address. A {{d3}} lets wireless devices join a wired network using radio signals.

mark_points.text: wireless access point (joins wireless devices to the LAN)
